sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46725" key="h(dufa/rugc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδῠ-φάρυγξ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υγγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n46725.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweet to the throat</tr_>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
